channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump tells Netanyahu not to strike Iran
item.description: President Trump advised Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu on Sunday against retaliating for Iran's missile attack, urging more diplomatic time.

item.title: Why Trump is seeking a share of AI profits
item.description: President Trump is pursuing a Bernie-like interest in having the U.S. government take stakes in AI giants — not out of populism, but with a dealmaker's approach.

item.title: AI is masking America's low literacy crisis
item.description: Millions of working Americans struggle to read at a functional level — and artificial intelligence may be helping hide it. Why it matters: Low literacy...

item.title: Children's wellbeing declines across the U.S.
item.description: Children's wellbeing declined nationally from 2019 to 2024, with kids in 29 states faring worse than before the COVID pandemic, according to a new report.
